flashcards.definition: Energy transfer via electromagnetic waves; requires no medium (how sunlight reaches Earth through space).
Heat transfer through direct molecular contact; ground heats air touching its surface.
Heat transfer through fluid movement; warm fluid rises, cool fluid sinks, creating circulation cells.
The fraction of incoming solar radiation reflected by a surface; ice/snow have high albedo, dark surfaces low.
The balance between incoming solar radiation and outgoing reflected/emitted radiation; determines Earth's temperature.
